meta.title: Workshop services
meta.description: Inspection, repair and reserve parachute packing to keep your equipment in perfect flying condition.

hero.title: Inspection, repair and reserve parachute packing
hero.subtitle: Keep your equipment in perfect flying condition

maintenance.title: Periodic inspection
maintenance.description: Complete inspection according to the official [ParachecK®](https://parapente.ffvl.fr/revision-voiles) standards of the [FFVL](https://federation.ffvl.fr/) to assess the actual condition of your equipment and fly safely.

image.alt: Porosity test on a paraglider wing performed in the workshop

frequency.title: Every 2 years
frequency.description: Inspection recommended every 2 years for a recent wing and annually for an older wing.

report.title: Detailed report
report.description: A complete report is provided with all control data and maintenance recommendations.

controls.title: Checks performed during inspection
controls.subtitle: Each inspection includes a battery of tests and measurements to guarantee your safety

porosity.title: Fabric porosity measurements
porosity.description: 5 measurements on the upper surface to check fabric ageing and air permeability.

fabricResistance.title: Fabric resistance tests
fabricResistance.description:
Mechanical resistance check:

- 1 measurement on upper surface
- 1 measurement on lower surface
- 1 measurement on rib (profile)

suspenseResistance.title: Line resistance tests
suspenseResistance.description: Test on each line cascade. Tested lines are systematically replaced with new ones.

measures.title: Line geometry measurements
measures.description: The entire line set is measured from risers to the wing, including brakes, to verify the geometry.

inspection.title: Complete visual and tactile inspection
inspection.description: Thorough inspection of the wing, risers, maillons, pulleys, lines, attachment points and fabric.

repair.title: Wing repair
repair.description:
Following an incident, repair and return to flying condition of your paraglider or paramotor wing. Types of repairs:

- Stitching
- Panel replacement
- Profile replacement
- Full fabric patch
- Simple fabric patch
- Self-adhesive patch
- Sheathed or unsheathed lines
- Complete line set replacement

image.alt: Paraglider line repair in the workshop
Repair with full fabric patch (Partial panel)

reserveParachutePacking.title: Reserve parachute packing
reserveParachutePacking.description:
Your reserve parachute is aired and ventilated, with systematic replacement of elastics and visual inspection to ensure optimal use. It is then repacked according to manufacturer standards to ensure your safety.

**For single, tandem, with or without container**

image.alt: Reserve parachute being aired in the workshop

frequency.title: Every year
frequency.description: It is recommended to repack the reserve parachute once a year to prevent, among other things, elastics from deteriorating or becoming embedded in the lines, and panels from sticking together.
